mano_cua.result_summary: Demo 页面 medium-editor 配置仅含 { buttonLabels: 'fontawesome' }，未配置 anchor.customClassOption 或 buttonClass，因此无法测试自定义 CSS 类是否被正确添加。<a> 元素已创建但仅覆盖部分选区文本(ell)，且 DOM 结构出现异常重组
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The <a> element EXISTS with href but has NO custom CSS class. Demo page config does not include customClassOption. Link only covers partial selection 'ell' instead of full cross-boundary text. DOM structure shows unexpected nesting reorganization.
